sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3100" key="a)ke/simos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκέσ-ιμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἀκέομαι</etym>) <sense id="n3100.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wholesome, healing</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.956f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
